summary:
Claim: Section 312 of the IPC deals with illegal abortion even when performed with a woman’s consent.  
Evidence: - Section 312 criminalizes unauthorized abortion procedures conducted by unqualified persons, regardless of whether the woman consents. - The legality hinges solely on the provider’s registration status, not on the patient’s willingness or consent.  
Answer: B

Answer: B. Answer choice: B
